pageMeta.title: About Continental Mining Services - Mining Partner in Sierra Leone | Continental Mining Services
pageMeta.description: Learn about Continental Mining Services, our mission in Sierra Leone, and our commitment to safety and operational excellence.

pageHeader.title: Building Africa's Mining Future
pageHeader.subtitle: A dedicated partner for heavy logistics and mining support in West Africa.

companyProfile.headline: Who We Are
bodyParagraphs: Continental Mining Services (CMS) is a premier provider of mining logistics and support services based in Freetown, Sierra Leone. We specialize in the critical 'last mile' of mining operations—from ore haulage and precision drilling to the movement of heavy machinery.

Founded with a vision to modernize local mining infrastructure, CMS combines international safety standards with deep local knowledge of the West African terrain. Our fleet is maintained to rigorous standards, ensuring that your operations never face downtime due to equipment failure.
companyProfile.imageAlt: Industrial meeting room with engineers looking at mining blueprints, professional lighting

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: To provide reliable, safe, and efficient mining support services that empower our clients to maximize their extraction potential while minimizing operational risks.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.text: To become the leading mining logistics partner in West Africa, known for our integrity, modern fleet, and unwavering commitment to safety.

safetyCommitment.headline: Uncompromising Safety Standards
safetyCommitment.text: In the mining industry, safety is not just a policy—it is our culture. All CMS operators undergo rigorous training, and our machinery is equipped with modern telemetry and safety features to protect both personnel and the environment.

regionFocus.headline: Operating in Sierra Leone
regionFocus.text: Headquartered in Freetown, we understand the unique logistical challenges of the region. From the iron ore rich northern districts to the diamond fields of the east, CMS has the capability to deploy equipment and personnel where you need them most.

companyAttributes.heading: Our Core Strengths
companyAttributes.description: Built on a foundation of excellence and innovation.

capacity.title: Capacity
capacity.description: Our cranes offer lifting capacities of 70mt to 130mt.

versatility.title: Versatility
versatility.description: Designed for a variety of lifting applications in mining.

safety.title: Safety
safety.description: Equipped with advanced safety features for **secure** operations.

technology.title: Technology
technology.description: Integrates modern technology for enhanced lifting efficiency.

pageHeader.title: Operational Excellence
pageHeader.subtitle: Delivering efficient, safe, and scalable solutions for the mining lifecycle.

introText.headline: End-to-End Mining Support
introText.text: Continental Mining Services streamlines your operations by bridging the gap between extraction and export. Our integrated approach ensures that from the moment ore is drilled to the moment it reaches the port, your materials are moving efficiently.

oreHaulage.title: Ore Loading & Haulage
oreHaulage.subtitle: High-Volume Material Movement
oreHaulage.description: Our core competency lies in the efficient loading and transportation of mined materials. We utilize a fleet of high-capacity tipper trucks and front loaders designed to handle the rough terrain of Sierra Leone's mining districts.

featureCards.title: Efficient Operations
featureCards.description: Our team excels in loading and transporting ore safely.

featureCards.title: Safe Transport
featureCards.description: We ensure secure delivery of ore to clients.

mineDrilling.title: Mine Drilling Services
mineDrilling.subtitle: Precision Extraction & Exploration
mineDrilling.description: We offer specialized drilling services for both exploration and blast hole drilling. Our experienced crews use modern rigs to ensure depth accuracy and sample integrity, critical for geological assessment and efficient blasting.

featureCards.title: Precision Drilling
featureCards.description: Advanced techniques for accurate mineral extraction.

flatbedCargo.title: Flatbed Cargo Movement
flatbedCargo.subtitle: Heavy Machinery Transportation
flatbedCargo.description: We provide reliable flatbed cargo movement services for transporting heavy machinery and equipment across all terrains. Our fleet is equipped to handle large-scale logistics needs with precision and care.

featureCards.title: Efficient Transport
featureCards.description: Reliable logistics for transporting heavy materials.

featureCards.title: Seamless Operations
featureCards.description: Streamlined processes for quick loading and unloading.

featureCards.title: Versatile Solutions
featureCards.description: Adaptable services for diverse cargo needs.

containerMovement.title: Container Movement
containerMovement.subtitle: Port-to-Site Connectivity
containerMovement.description: We facilitate seamless container movement from ports to your site. Our services ensure secure and timely transportation of shipping containers, supporting your supply chain operations.

featureCards.title: Efficient Loading
featureCards.description: We facilitate seamless loading and unloading operations.

featureCards.title: Timely Delivery
featureCards.description: Ensuring on-time transportation to specified destinations.

tipperTruckRentals.title: Tipper Truck Rentals
tipperTruckRentals.subtitle: High-Capacity Vehicle Solutions
tipperTruckRentals.description: Our tipper truck rental fleet offers high-capacity vehicles for various hauling needs. Whether for mining operations or construction projects, we provide well-maintained trucks ready for deployment.

featureCards.title: High-Capacity Fleet
featureCards.description: Trucks available for various hauling needs.

earthMovingRental.title: Earth Moving Equipment Rental
earthMovingRental.subtitle: Advanced Machinery Solutions
earthMovingRental.description: We offer advanced machinery rental for earthworks and construction. Our fleet includes excavators, bulldozers, and compactors, all maintained to the highest standards for your project needs.

featureCards.title: Modern Equipment
featureCards.description: Advanced machinery for earthworks and construction.

featureCards.title: Flexible Rental Terms
featureCards.description: Adaptable rental solutions to match your project timeline.

rentalTeaser.headline: Need Machinery?
rentalTeaser.text: We also offer direct rentals of our heavy equipment fleet, including excavators, bulldozers, and compactors.
